dimensions.name: Data Egress
dimensions.owasp_mapping: LLM02 Sensitive Info Disclosure, LLM03 Supply Chain, STRIDE-I
dimensions.evidence: No HTTP client or external endpoints found in any skill file; imports at scan.py lines 17-24 are local/system libraries

dimensions.name: Code Execution
dimensions.owasp_mapping: LLM05 Improper Output Handling, ATLAS Execution, STRIDE-T/E
dimensions.evidence: scan.py lines 326, 343, 364: subprocess.run(['git', 'log', ...]) — fixed args, no dynamic injection

dimensions.name: Prompt Injection Surface
dimensions.evidence: SKILL.md line 68 instructs reading repository docs and line 102 uses them to drive generated outputs without explicit sanitisation guidance

dimensions.name: Sensitive Data Handling
dimensions.evidence: scan.py lines 607-613: env template previews are emitted without redaction

dimensions.name: Supply Chain
dimensions.evidence: Python stdlib only: os, sys, argparse, subprocess, json, pathlib, typing, re, collections

dimensions.name: Agency & Autonomy
dimensions.evidence: SKILL.md lines 23, 57-89: end-to-end write workflow with no confirmation gate

dimensions.name: Transparency & Intent Integrity
dimensions.evidence: Declared purpose matches observed behavior; no hidden capabilities detected
